name: Willard Robison
description: American vocalist, pianist, and composer of popular songs (1894–1968)
abstract: Willard Robison (September 18, 1894 – June 24, 1968) was an American vocalist, pianist, and composer of popular songs, born in Shelbina, Missouri. His songs reflect a rural, melancholy theme steeped in Americana and their warm style has drawn comparison to Hoagy Carmichael.

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: I remember 'Taint So, Honey,' one of Willard Robison's things.
